name: claudecode-community
author: Dominik Fretz, Rye Smith, Claude Community Australia

scripts.dev: bun run build:mcp-ui && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare node scripts/prisma-generate.mjs && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare next dev --webpack
scripts.build: bun run build:mcp-ui && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare node scripts/prisma-generate.mjs && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare next build --webpack
scripts.build:cf: node scripts/gen-wrangler.mjs && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/inject-workflow-exports.mjs
scripts.build:cf:selfhost: node scripts/gen-wrangler.mjs --template wrangler.selfhost.template.jsonc && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/inject-workflow-exports.mjs
scripts.selfhost:deploy: bun run build:cf:selfhost && bunx opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.preview: bun run build:cf && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare wrangler dev
scripts.staging:d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging
scripts.staging:d1:seed-tenant: tsx scripts/seed-tenant.ts au > scripts/.tenant-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env staging --file=scripts/.tenant-seed.sql
scripts.staging:maintenance:on: echo 'true' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env staging
scripts.staging:maintenance:off: echo 'false' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env staging
scripts.platform:staging:d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging-platform
scripts.platform:staging:seed-admin: test -n "$PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL" || (echo 'Set PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL=you@example.com' && exit 1); tsx scripts/seed-platform.ts "$PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL" > scripts/.platform-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env staging-platform --file=scripts/.platform-seed.sql
scripts.local:platform:seed-admin: test -n "$PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL" || (echo 'Set PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL=you@example.com' && exit 1); tsx scripts/seed-platform.ts "$PLATFORM_OWNER_EMAIL" > scripts/.platform-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=scripts/.platform-seed.sql
scripts.production:d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
scripts.production:d1:seed-tenant: tsx scripts/seed-tenant.ts au > scripts/.tenant-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env production --file=scripts/.tenant-seed.sql
scripts.production:maintenance:on: echo 'true' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env production
scripts.production:maintenance:off: echo 'false' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env production
scripts.nz:staging:d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env staging-nz
scripts.nz:staging:d1:seed-tenant: tsx scripts/seed-tenant.ts nz > scripts/.tenant-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env staging-nz --file=scripts/.tenant-seed.sql
scripts.nz:staging:maintenance:on: echo 'true' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env staging-nz
scripts.nz:staging:maintenance:off: echo 'false' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env staging-nz
scripts.nz:production:d1:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production-nz
scripts.nz:production:d1:seed-tenant: tsx scripts/seed-tenant.ts nz > scripts/.tenant-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env production-nz --file=scripts/.tenant-seed.sql
scripts.nz:production:maintenance:on: echo 'true' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env production-nz
scripts.nz:production:maintenance:off: echo 'false' | wrangler secret put MAINTENANCE_MODE --env production-nz
scripts.deploy:all: bun run production:deploy && bun run nz:production:deploy
scripts.d1:migrate:all: bun run production:d1:migrate && bun run nz:production:d1:migrate
scripts.local:d1:seed-tenant: tsx scripts/seed-tenant.ts au > scripts/.tenant-seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=scripts/.tenant-seed.sql
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:next
scripts.check: biome check . && bun run lint:next && bun run typecheck
